review_summary.title: Minimal local actionable ontology seed for connected Google Sheets cash-basis operational reporting
review_summary.accepted_as: official onto-mcp direct reconstruct seed artifact

acceptance_decisions.why: The official direct reconstruct seed is validator-clean and states cash-basis local operational reporting scope.
Object/link/value types are useful as a compact local frame, but live instances and relation edges are still deferred.
Actions identify review work, but runtime proof and review ownership are not active.
Writeback target and permission contract are not authorized or tested.
Local boundary, repeated evidence, metric equivalence, and human approval are not complete.
The connected Sheet is cash-basis operational reporting; accounting-kr/K-IFRS/K-GAAP alignment is not claimed.

maturation_frontier.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports static seed objects and value-type surfaces, but the assessment states that concrete live object instances are not enumerated.
maturation_frontier.human_question: Seed object types should bind to which accepted document graph instances?
maturation_frontier.done_when: Each seed object type has accepted instances or an explicit non-instance rationale.

maturation_frontier.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports intended relation labels, but the assessment states that explicit structural relation edges are not accepted as observed graph facts.
maturation_frontier.human_question: Which document hierarchy and pipeline edges are strong enough to become seed relations?
maturation_frontier.done_when: Report-document-calculation/review relations are linked to accepted graph edges.

maturation_frontier.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports the no-label-only metric merge policy, but equivalence among 결제액, 매출, and 순매출 remains unresolved without evidence for basis, period, filters, aggregation, source lineage, transformation role, and formula-result authority.
maturation_frontier.human_question: Should 결제액, 매출, and 순매출 stay split, or can any scoped variants be merged?
maturation_frontier.done_when: Each repeated metric label is accepted as same, scoped variant, or separate concept.

maturation_frontier.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports validation queues and local seed overview surfaces, but the responsible review actor is unspecified.
maturation_frontier.human_question: Who is allowed to approve formula authority, metric equivalence, and writeback readiness?
maturation_frontier.done_when: Every review action has an accountable owner or role.

maturation_frontier.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports validation-oriented review surfaces, but active proof, query, or visualization artifacts are not provided for runtime proof.
maturation_frontier.human_question: Which executable checks prove the seed assertions for future reruns?
maturation_frontier.done_when: Accepted seed claims can be rechecked from source artifacts without LLM judgment.

maturation_frontier.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports validation-only posture and does not support an authorized writeback target contract or action-ready writeback automation.
maturation_frontier.human_question: Is any writeback desired, and if so what target and permission boundary apply?
maturation_frontier.done_when: Writeback is explicitly denied or backed by a tested, authorized contract.

revision_proposals.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports static seed objects and value-type surfaces, but concrete live object instances are not enumerated.
revision_proposals.expected_effect: Do not accept live instance claims until additional evidence enumerates concrete instances.

revision_proposals.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports intended relation labels, but explicit structural relation edges are not accepted as observed graph facts.
revision_proposals.expected_effect: Keep structural relation labels as intended surfaces only; do not promote relation edges without observed graph evidence.

revision_proposals.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports the no-label-only metric merge policy, while equivalence among 결제액, 매출, and 순매출 remains unresolved.
revision_proposals.expected_effect: Keep the metric concepts separate until evidence resolves basis, period, filters, aggregation, source lineage, transformation role, and formula-result authority.

revision_proposals.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports validation queues and local seed overview surfaces, but the responsible review actor is unspecified.
revision_proposals.expected_effect: Leave review ownership as an open question and block reviewer-dependent acceptance.

revision_proposals.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports validation-oriented review surfaces, but active proof, query, or visualization artifacts are not provided for runtime proof.
revision_proposals.expected_effect: Do not treat runtime proof as active until proof artifacts are provided.

revision_proposals.rationale: obs_8807fb41b47b8a8e supports validation-only posture and does not support an authorized writeback target contract or action-ready writeback automation.
revision_proposals.expected_effect: Keep writeback outside action-ready scope until an authorized writeback target contract exists.

next_actions: Keep shared ontology updates at 0 and keep the seed as a proposal, not an action-ready ontology.
Collect evidence for concrete live object instances before accepting instance claims.
Collect observed graph evidence before promoting structural relation labels into accepted relation edges.
Keep 결제액, 매출, and 순매출 as separate concepts until basis, period, filters, aggregation, source lineage, transformation role, and formula-result authority are resolved.
Leave review ownership as an open question because the responsible review actor is unspecified.
Collect active proof, query, or visualization artifacts before treating runtime proof as supported.
Keep writeback deferred until an authorized writeback target contract exists.
process_decision: Use the official seed as a local, validator-clean seed authority for the next maturation loop. Do not use it for automated actions, writeback, shared ontology promotion, or accounting-domain classification until the frontier is resolved.
